goal: 把 demo/ 工具库补齐到可发布状态（迭代到 DoD）
cycle_scope: one module or one criterion per cycle

dod_criteria.desc: 所有 demo/*.py doctest 全过
dod_criteria.check: for f in demo/*.py; do python3 -m doctest "$f" || exit 1; done

dod_criteria.desc: 每个非测试 demo 模块定义 __all__
dod_criteria.check: python3 -c "import glob,sys; bad=[f for f in glob.glob('demo/*.py') if 'test_' not in f and '__all__' not in open(f).read()]; sys.exit(1 if bad else 0)"

dod_criteria.desc: 新增 demo/textkit.py 的 truncate() 且测试全过
dod_criteria.check: test -f textkit.py && python3 -c "import test_textkit as t; [getattr(t,n)() for n in dir(t) if n.startswith('test_')]"
